info.title: Dynamic Checkout API
info.description: Cross-chain payment routing for AI agents. Accepts any token on any supported chain and settles to a target token on a destination chain via automatic swap and bridge. Backs the dynamic-agent-payments CLI for autonomous x402 and MPP paywall resolution.

bearerToken.description: Dynamic API token with `dyn_` prefix from https://app.dynamic.xyz/dashboard/developer/api. Required for Admin endpoints.

sessionToken.name: x-dynamic-checkout-session-token
sessionToken.description: Session token returned by createTransaction. Required for SDK transaction endpoints.

chainName.description: Target chain family: EVM or SOL.

chainId.description: Chain ID for EVM chains (e.g. 8453 = Base, 1 = Ethereum, 137 = Polygon).

tokenAddress.description: ERC-20 or SPL token mint address on the settlement chain.

isNative.description: Whether the token is the native token for the chain (e.g. ETH, SOL).

identifier.description: Destination wallet address to receive settled funds.

mode.description: payment: receiver fixes the amount (invoices, e-commerce). deposit: sender chooses the amount (top-ups, on-ramps).

strategy.description: Route optimization. cheapest: lowest total cost. fastest: fewest steps. preferred_order: first available in settlement order.

settlements.description: Accepted settlement options (token + chain) the router may settle into.

settlementConfig.description: Tokens and chains you accept settlement in, plus the routing strategy.

destinations.description: One or more delivery destinations (wallet address + chain). At least one is required.

destinationConfig.description: Where settled funds are delivered — the receiving wallet address(es) and chain.

depositConfig.description: Optional. Deposit mode only. Configures minimum amount and preset options shown to the sender.

presets.description: Preset deposit amounts shown to the user (USD strings).

enableOrchestration.description: Optional. Default true. When false, skips cross-chain settlement orchestration.

id.description: Checkout ID. Cache this and reuse it across all transactions to the same destination.

CheckoutUpdateRequest.description: All fields are optional — only send what you want to change.

mode.description: payment: receiver fixes the amount. deposit: sender chooses the amount.

enableOrchestration.description: Whether Dynamic handles quote optimization, fee collection, and fund settlement automatically.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the checkout was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the checkout was last updated.

amount.description: Payment amount in the specified currency (USD string, e.g. "1.00").

memo.description: Optional arbitrary metadata attached to the transaction for tracking.

expiresIn.description: Session TTL in seconds. Default: 3600 (1 hour).

destinationAddresses.description: Optional. Override the checkout destination for this transaction only.

id.description: Transaction ID used in all subsequent steps.

sessionToken.description: Pass this as `x-dynamic-checkout-session-token` header on all SDK transaction endpoints.

fromChainId.description: Chain ID of the source chain (e.g. "1" for Ethereum mainnet).

fromTokenAddress.description: Token address on the source chain to swap from. Use 0x000...000 for native tokens (ETH, MATIC).

slippage.description: Slippage tolerance in percent. Defaults to provider setting.

totalFeeUsd.description: Total fees in USD including gas, bridge, and swap fees.

fromAmount.description: Amount of source token to spend (including fees).

toAmount.description: Amount of settlement token received at the destination.

estimatedTimeSec.description: Estimated seconds to complete the cross-chain settlement.

expiresAt.description: When this quote expires. Call prepare before this time.

version.description: Quote version. Pass to prepare to confirm the quote used.

assertBalanceForGasCost.description: Reject if the wallet lacks sufficient native token for gas.

assertBalanceForTransferAmount.description: Reject if the wallet lacks sufficient token balance for the swap.

EvmApproval.description: ERC-20 approval required before the main swap transaction.

signingPayload.description: Signing payload. Contains evmTransaction (EVM), serializedTransaction (SOL/SUI), or psbt (BTC).

serializedTransaction.description: Base64-encoded serialized transaction for Solana or Sui.

psbt.description: Base64-encoded unsigned PSBT for Bitcoin transactions.

txHash.description: Transaction hash from the broadcast. For Solana: base58-encoded signature.

executionState.description: Current execution phase of the transaction.

settlementState.description: Settlement progression: none → routing → bridging → swapping → settling → completed. Same-chain same-token payments jump directly to completed.

riskState.description: Risk screening status. Must be `cleared` or `not_required` before fetching a quote. Starts as `unknown`, transitions to `cleared`, `not_required`, or `blocked`.

post.description: Defines a destination chain, token, and wallet address for cross-chain settlement. The returned checkout ID is reusable — cache it and pass it to createTransaction for every payment. One checkout config per destination address + token.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID from your dashboard.

post.summary: Create a payment transaction for a USD amount
post.description: Creates a transaction under an existing checkout config. Returns a transactionId and sessionToken. The sessionToken is required as `x-dynamic-checkout-session-token` for all subsequent steps.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: checkoutId
parameters.description: Checkout ID returned by createCheckout.

post.summary: Add the agent's source wallet to a transaction
post.description: Links the agent's wallet (address, chain family, chain ID) as the payment source. Must be called before requesting a quote.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

403.description: Source blocked by sanctions screening — cancel and retry with a different source wallet.

get.summary: Get the status of a payment transaction
get.description: Returns executionState, settlementState, and riskState. Poll after attachSource until riskState is `cleared` or `not_required`. Poll after broadcast until settlementState is `completed`.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

post.summary: Get a swap quote for a source token
post.description: Returns fromAmount, toAmount, estimated time, fees, and expiry. Quotes expire quickly — call prepare before expiresAt. Retry on 422 (quote expired) up to 3 times.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

422.description: Quote expired or risk check not yet cleared.

post.summary: Generate the signing payload and lock the quote
post.description: Locks the current quote and returns the signing payload (EVM transaction or serialized Solana transaction). Call only when ready to sign immediately — this starts an expiry clock. If signing fails, call cancel to release the locked state.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

post.description: After signing and broadcasting the transaction, record the tx hash so Dynamic can track cross-chain settlement. For Solana: pass the base58-encoded transaction signature.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

200.description: Broadcast recorded. Poll getTransaction until settlementState = completed.

422.description: Transaction not in expected state for broadcast.

post.description: Valid in states: initiated, source_attached, quoted, signing. Call this if anything fails after prepare to release the locked quote. Best-effort — may fail if the transaction has already advanced.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: Checkout transaction ID returned when the transaction was opened.

422.description: Transaction cannot be cancelled in its current state.

post.summary: Simulate an EVM transaction before signing
post.description: Dry-run an EVM transaction against the current chain state. Use this after prepare to verify the transaction will succeed before committing gas. Returns success/failure and any revert reason.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

transaction.description: The EVM transaction to simulate (to, data, value, gas, etc.).

post.summary: Simulate a Solana transaction before signing
post.description: Dry-run a base64-encoded Solana transaction against the current cluster state. Use after prepare to verify the transaction will succeed before signing and broadcasting.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

transaction.description: Base64-encoded serialized Solana transaction (from the prepare signingPayload).

post.description: Replaces the fee payer of a Solana transaction with a sponsored account via the Grid API by Squads, so the user does not need SOL for gas. Only available for environments with SVM gas sponsorship enabled.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

transaction.description: Base64-encoded unsigned Solana transaction to sponsor.

200.description: Sponsored transaction with fee payer replaced.

transaction.description: Base64-encoded sponsored transaction ready to sign.

400.description: Invalid transaction or gas sponsorship not enabled.

get.summary: Get transaction history for a wallet address
get.description: Fetches confirmed transactions for a wallet address on a given chain. Useful for verifying a broadcast landed on-chain and for displaying payment history.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: chainName
parameters.description: The `chainName` parameter.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address to fetch history for.

parameters.name: networkId
parameters.description: Chain/network ID (e.g. 8453 for Base, 101 for Solana mainnet).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

get.summary: Get token balances for a wallet address on a chain
get.description: Returns all token balances for a wallet on the given chain family. Use networkId to filter to a specific chain and avoid fetching all chains.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: chainName
parameters.description: Chain family: EVM or SOL.

parameters.name: accountAddress
parameters.description: Wallet address to query balances for.

parameters.name: networkId
parameters.description: Filter to a specific chain by network/chain ID (e.g. "8453" for Base). Omit to return balances across all supported chains for this chain family.

parameters.name: includeNative
parameters.description: Include native token balance (ETH, SOL, etc.) in the response. Defaults to false — native balances are omitted unless this is true.

parameters.name: filterSpamTokens
parameters.description: Filter out spam/dust tokens. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: checkoutId
parameters.description: Checkout configuration ID returned by `POST /environments/{environmentId}/checkouts`.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: checkoutId
parameters.description: Checkout configuration ID returned by `POST /environments/{environmentId}/checkouts`.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Dynamic environment ID (UUID) from your dashboard at app.dynamic.xyz.

parameters.name: checkoutId
parameters.description: Checkout configuration ID returned by `POST /environments/{environmentId}/checkouts`.

200.description: Checkout deleted. Returns the deleted checkout object.
